title: The Ancient Kingdom’s Shadow
description: On pages 13–13, this part focuses on Kizaru, Unknown person #13, Shanks, Nami, Robin as Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.
scene: Vegapunk’s satellites reveal the island’s technology and ancient past while CP0 approaches and Bonney pursues the truth about Kuma.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Woodah!! This is awesome!! These futuristic duds are the freakin' best!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But wow, nami-san! you and Robin-chan look amazing!()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You cook real tough in that, Robin!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The problem with being a genius...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...is that you can see your own future coming too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What are you talking about, veganunk?

dialogue.speaker: Shanks
dialogue.text: Don't kid about something like that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just wanted you to know about this...

summary: This part advances the Egghead / Vegapunk Truth through 20 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
